name: Univentures Public Company Limited
summary: Univentures Public Company Limited engages in the property development business in Thailand. It develops and sells condominiums, as well as rents office buildings. The company also manufactures and sells zinc oxide and chemicals; and provides time recorders, parking control equipment, and electronics equipment. In addition, it offers finance and investment consulting services; investment and management consulting; and other related services. Further, the company operates as a manager of trusts for real estate investments; and invests in energy services, hotel, and other companies. Additionally, it acts as a broker and agent in real estate-related business; and offers corporate registration services. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Univentures Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Adelfos Company Limited.
